subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the Divine Lote-Tree! Upon thee be the glory of God and His praise, His light and His splendour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره المنتهی علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه و نوره و ضیائه و
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
